q: Trace the MCP API key into the app: which environment variable carries it into the container, and which source file reads that variable?
hops: cross yaml->code: deployment.yaml env MCP_API_KEY <- secretKeyRef -> src/auth.ts process.env.MCP_API_KEY

q: The Pi-hole client reads its password from the environment — which Kubernetes Secret name and key supply that env var?
hops: cross code->yaml: clients/pihole.ts PIHOLE_PASSWORD -> deployment.yaml secretKeyRef mcp-homelab-secrets/pihole-password

q: restart_deployment only works on an allowlist of deployments — which file defines that list, and which utility function checks it?
hops: code: tools/cluster.ts restart_deployment -> utils/whitelist.ts ALLOWED_DEPLOYMENTS + isDeploymentAllowed

q: Which tool module registers fix_jellyfin_metadata, and which client file implements the calls it makes?
Which client function does touch_nas_path call to do the actual work, and where is that function defined?
hops: code (DYNAMIC import): tools/media.ts await import('../clients/synology.js') -> touchPath

q: Which container image does the mcp-homelab deployment run?
NAS filesystem access is restricted to a set of allowed path prefixes — name the environment variable holding them and the file that enforces the restriction.
hops: cross yaml->code: deployment.yaml NAS_ALLOWED_PATHS -> clients/synology.ts ALLOWED_PATH_PREFIXES

q: The ClusterRole grants exactly one mutating verb on apps/deployments — which verb, and which code-level guard complements that permission?
hops: cross rbac->code: k8s/clusterrole.yaml verbs [patch] on deployments -> utils/whitelist.ts guard
